sinchewdaily.caption:
政府原则上同意撤除T20高收入群体的RON 95燃油补贴，竟招来民间反对。受访民众一致批评政府，指这是对T20群体“开刀”，并指他们也同样属纳税人，应有福同享有难同当。

同时，马来西亚消费人协会联合会主席拿督马里慕对直击这项政策痛点：既然政府决定提供全民RON 95燃油补贴，就应贯彻到底，绝不能再以T20或其他收入阶级来划清界限。

他更直接向安华抛出灵魂拷问：“你必须问自己，你究竟是穷人的首相，还是全马人民的首相？”

宣布离开公正党并接管同心党的拉菲兹受访时坦言，同心党未必能在下届大选中胜出，现阶段最重要的是先播下“种子”。

另外，拉菲兹证实，在来届大选中，他与聂纳兹米将继续在原有的班登及斯迪亚旺沙国席披甲上阵。 

#Pocketimes #百格 #拉菲兹 #同心党 #Bersama #大选 #选举

大马女单勒莎娜今日打出代表作，她成功以直落两局战胜赛会3号种子日本名将宫崎友花，勇闯大马羽球大师赛（超级500赛）8强！

勒莎娜虽然是大马首号女单，但世界排名第32的她赛前并不被看好能战胜世界排名第9的宫崎友花。

乌鲁登柏灵甘榜瓜拉塞一家人被指长达13年没有电供，申请不果的问题，主要原因相信是与这户人家的房屋建在政府土地上有关。

彭亨州官委州议员哈里斯沙烈指出，这起事件因为该户家人日前高举大字报，拦车求助彭亨苏丹的抖音视频广传后，而在社交媒体引起广泛关注。当局已关注有关课题，并第一时间联系国能公司，以了解涉事家庭申请电供的进展。

“根据查证结果，有关电供申请其实早已获得批准，包括取得乡村及区域发展部批准，以展开相关基础设施安装工程。

前一秒还在路边争得面红耳赤，下一秒却因一句道歉迅速化解误会。

一段在社交媒体流传的视频显示，两名男子在路边因沟通误会发生争执，双方你来我往，气氛一度紧张。

画面显示，双方因停车与指示问题产生误解，各自坚持立场，现场火药味逐渐升温。

不过，整段争执仅持续约22秒，其中一人率先放软语气并主动道歉，表示“对不起好吗？”，另一方也随即回应“好的，对不起”，气氛瞬间降温。

许多家长都知道“不能让幼童吃坚果”以防窒息，但有一件日常生活中随处可见、外表看起来毫无杀伤力的日用品，却是儿科医师行医多年公认“最害怕的隐形杀手”，那就是吸管套！

一名儿科医生痛心分享，曾看过一名年仅1岁的宝宝不慎吸入吸管套，导致双肺被堵死，不幸成为植物人。更惊悚的是，这件物品一旦贴在呼吸道，“连海姆立克急救法也难救！”

一名林姓儿科医生在社交平台Threads上发文透露，在他刚当住院医生的时期，他的老师曾分享一个令他至今难以忘怀的卧床案例。导致宝宝变成植物人的元凶，竟是大家天天都会随手撕开“和”丢弃的“吸管塑料套”。

​📍完整新闻点击Story (link)☝🏻：
#星洲日报 #星洲网 #sinchewdaily #sinchew
新闻链接：https://www.sinchew.com.my/news/20260521/international/7521643

尽管缺了右手，却从未向命运低头，34岁的尤葛斯瓦兰每天在巴生一家船运公司接听电话、接待访客及处理询问，用自己的努力与坚持，证明残障从来不是阻碍人生前进的理由。

来自沙亚南的尤葛斯瓦兰坦言，在多年因身体缺陷而求职碰壁后，如今终于拥有一份稳定工作，不仅重拾自信，也重新找回人生方向与价值。

网络近日疯传一段工厂工业意外监控视频，画面显示一名工人在操作大型机械设备时，不幸被卷入运转中的主轴并高速旋转，场面骇人。

经查证，这起一般机械伤害事故是于1月26日傍晚6时10分许发生，涉事地点为位于奉化区莼湖街道滨海新区的“百琪达智能科技（宁波）股份有限公司”2号车间。

中国浙江省宁波市奉化区应急管理局早前已发布官方事故调查报告证实，涉事操作工已不幸伤重身亡，涉事企业也因安全防护漏洞，被勒令承担逾百万令吉的经济损失。

“毕竟现在是社交媒体时代，谁在乎一个政党的主席是谁呢？” 

拉菲兹与聂纳兹米接管的同心党（Parti Bersama Malaysia）受到许多关注。针对领导层与党主席一事，拉菲兹接受《星洲日报》与《百格》专访时表示，他们不需要遵循国内的政治传统，一加入政党就一定要当主席，而现在同心党的领导层都是普通人。

询及选举事宜，拉菲兹表明，同心党会上阵来临选举， 可能最早在6月介绍首批潜在候选人。

#Pocketimes #百格 #拉菲兹 #Rafizi #聂纳兹米 #Bersama #领导层 #选举

coinsauce.caption:
SpaceX filed its S-1 with the SEC to go public on Nasdaq under the ticker “SPCX,” seeking to raise up to $80 billion and potentially break Saudi Aramco’s IPO record. The company generated $4.69 billion in Q1 2026 revenue from 10.3 million Starlink subscribers.

SpaceX also reported a $4.28 billion net loss from heavy investment in Starship, satellites, and AI infrastructure. The filing revealed a $1.25 billion monthly AI deal with Anthropic and 18,712 Bitcoin worth about $1.29 billion.

The SEC's case against these celebrities wasn't about crypto being a scam. Under Section 17(b) of the Securities Act, anyone paid to promote a security has to say they were paid. The token's quality is irrelevant. The violation is staying silent about the check.

That's why the numbers look strange. Kendra Lust was paid $955 and settled for $3,882. Jake Paul was paid about $25,000 and settled for over $100,000. The penalty isn't tied to how much harm the post caused or how big the token was. It's disgorgement of the fee, plus interest, plus a civil penalty on top. Posting a disclosure label would have made all of it legal.

Most settled without admitting or denying anything, which is the standard way these end. Cheaper than fighting. Soulja Boy was the only one in the group who didn't settle. And the separate, more famous cases worked differently. Kim Kardashian's $1.3 million was a single high profile EthereumMax settlement, while the FTX names like Tom Brady were sued by investors, not fined by the SEC, and mostly won.

May 2026 is shaping up to be a pivotal month for the crypto markets!

From major shifts at the Federal Reserve and crucial macroeconomic data releases to significant token unlocks and ongoing geopolitical factors, there are a lot of moving parts that could drive heavy market volatility this month.

Whether you are watching the charts or tracking regulatory updates, you'll want to be prepared. Swipe through to see the critical dates and events you need to mark on your calendar!

Follow @coinsauce for more Monthly Previews

Bitcoin’s rally toward $80K is bringing traders back into the market, and a large portion of that activity is flowing into Binance.

According to CryptoQuant, Binance led all exchanges with $9.03B in Bitcoin open interest during the rally, around 73% higher than the second-largest exchange. At the same time, Binance now holds roughly 66% of all exchange USDT reserves, highlighting how much liquidity is concentrated on the platform.

Altcoin activity is also heating up again, with deposit activity reaching a 4-month high as traders rotate back into the market.

As momentum returns, liquidity, execution, and market depth matter more than ever, and Binance continues to be one of the main venues where traders are positioning themselves.

President Trump is scheduled to swear in Kevin Warsh as the new Federal Reserve Chair at the White House on Friday, May 22, 2026. Warsh was confirmed by the Senate in a 54 to 45 vote on May 13, replacing Jerome Powell after his term officially ended on May 15. Powell has remained as chair pro tempore during the transition.

The appointment is closely watched by financial markets because the Federal Reserve controls US interest rates, liquidity, and broader monetary policy. Warsh is viewed as more open to financial innovation and digital asset integration than previous Fed leadership, making his arrival important for both traditional markets and crypto.

Markets will now watch for Warsh’s first public comments as Fed Chair, especially around interest rates, inflation policy, and the future relationship between banks, fintech firms, and digital assets. The White House ceremony itself is also notable, marking the first presidential Fed Chair swearing in at the White House since Ronald Reagan appointed Alan Greenspan in 1987.

Follow @Coinsauce for more smart crypto news.

Meta announced Libra in 2019 with Visa, Mastercard, and PayPal as partners. Regulators pushed back. Partners dropped out one by one. It rebranded to Diem, never launched a coin, and sold everything to Silvergate for $182 million in 2022.

Then they tried Instagram NFTs. Launched May 2022, expanded to 100 countries, shut it down in March 2023.

Now they are back. No proprietary coin this time. Meta started paying creators in USDC through Stripe in April 2026. Full rollout across Instagram, WhatsApp, and Facebook planned for the second half of 2026. Seven years later, Meta is not trying to build the system. They are plugging into it.

Someone used @lovable.dev to build Discomorphism, a web tool that transforms any logos or profile pictures into shiny, disco ball style app icons with reflective mosaic effects.

The project was inspired by Spotify’s temporary green disco ball version of its iconic app logo, released for the company’s 20th anniversary.

The web app itself was created using Lovable, an AI-powered platform that can turn natural language prompts into fully functional apps.

@lovable.dev allows anyone to turn an idea into an app with no coding experience required.

#lovablepartner

Trump says Netanyahu "will do whatever I want him to do. He's a great guy,"

Adding, "I'm right now, at 99% in Israel. I could run for Prime Minister. So, maybe after I do this I'll go to Israel run for Prime Minister."

President Trump signed an executive order aimed at reducing regulatory barriers for fintech firms and supporting the integration of digital assets into traditional finance and payment systems.

The order tells federal regulators to review rules, licensing processes, and guidance that may limit innovation or make it harder for fintech companies to partner with regulated financial institutions.

A key focus is crypto and blockchain services. The Federal Reserve will evaluate whether non bank financial companies, including digital asset firms, should get direct access to Fed payment accounts and payment infrastructure.

Regulators have 90 days to identify barriers, while the Federal Reserve has 120 days to submit findings and recommendations to the White House.

The biggest crypto exchanges are not owned by the people you think. Coinbase's largest shareholders are BlackRock and Vanguard. Binance sold a $2 billion stake to Abu Dhabi's sovereign wealth fund. The company that owns the New York Stock Exchange has a board seat at OKX. Citadel Securities, one of the largest market makers in traditional finance, invested $200 million in Kraken.

Hana Bank just paid $670 million for a piece of Upbit. These are not startups run by outsiders anymore. The same institutions that crypto was designed to operate without now sit on the cap tables of the exchanges people use every day.
